ops.text:
E28 VERIFY LANE — CONFIRMED. Independent recomputation from raw artifacts (no harness code reused: labels derived from raw eval/watcher_eval.parquet keyed by id, NOT EvalFrame.load; own O(m*n) Mann-Whitney AUC; own DeLong structural-components SE; plus a fresh-seed (20260719) stratified paired bootstrap, B=20000).

Every headline stat reproduces to float noise (max abs diff 3.93e-14 across all): auc_incumbent 0.93168967 (==frozen v002, and independently recomputes it), auc_new 0.91892415 (==train_report/score_report metric exactly — the captured-then-persisted probs round-trip losslessly, validating the runpy monkeypatch capture), delta -0.01276552, se_paired 0.00847489, se_unpaired 0.01525173, rho 0.69844785, ci95_paired [-0.02937601, +0.00384496], mde_paired 0.02374326, z -1.5063, p2 0.13200. cov matrix matches to ~1e-18. n_pos 335 / n_neg 293 confirmed independently from parquet; frame digest e85dc4a2ec94aae0 matches both probs metas. Supporting headline facts confirmed: train_rows 6731, examples_trained 5093, ess_weighted 4019.0, labels_changed 33, max_token 3878<4096 -> 0 overlong.

Fresh-seed bootstrap CI [-0.029978, +0.003525] (boot_se 0.0085172) agrees with the analytic DeLong CI and likewise straddles 0 — independent confirmation.

Card rule applied correctly: actionable iff (CI excludes 0) AND (|delta|>=paired MDE). CI includes 0 (false) AND |delta| 0.01277 < MDE 0.02374 (false) => NOT actionable => "within noise floor". Paired MDE is the applicable one (both arms persisted on the identical frame per instrument card); |delta| is also far below the unpaired watcher floor 0.0453, so the verdict is robust either way. Pre-registered criterion (ledger opening entry) evaluated exactly as registered.

Not independently verifiable (acknowledged in the claim, out of scope for measurement verify): exact metered Tinker spend (observe_fit_score discards it; train_exit=0, cap $9 cleared). Non-headline calibration sanity I computed (own impl, not claimed): acc@0.5 new 0.785 vs inc 0.818, ECE new 0.162 vs inc 0.106 — consistent with the slightly-negative point estimate, non-gating. Verify artifacts: out/verify/verify_recompute.py + verify_report.json.
